description: This file provides a set of functions to manage notes stored in local storage. It includes functionalities for creating, reading, updating, deleting, and searching notes, defining a consistent storage key, and helper functions.

methods.name: generateId()
methods.description: Generates a unique ID based on the current timestamp and a random string.

methods.name: saveNotes(notes)
methods.description: Internal function to save notes array to local storage.
